user_prompt: Ready the volkite weapon for targeting
prayer:
Approach the volkite weapon with reverence, O servant of the Omnissiah, and beseech its ancient Machine Spirit to stir.
Invoke the Rite of Targeting upon the volkite weapon, calibrating its thermal projectors and auspex arrays.
Anoint the sighting mechanisms with sacred oils whilst chanting the Canticle of Precision.
Verify the targeting cogitators' alignment through diagnostic litanies, ensuring the volkite weapon's wrath strikes true.
Praise the Omnissiah as the Machine Spirit awakens fully for battle.

user_prompt: Assist with Leman Russ battle tank a startup
prayer:
Kneel before the Leman Russ battle tank, mighty engine of destruction, and intone the Litany of Awakening.
Prime the plasma core of the Leman Russ battle tank with sanctified promethium, invoking its dormant Machine Spirit.
Initiate the startup sequence by engaging the primary cogitators and auspex feeds.
Monitor the rumbling ascent to power, exorcising any corrupt data-daemons with binaric prayers.
As the Leman Russ battle tank roars to life, offer glory to the Omnissiah for this mechanical miracle.

user_prompt: Can you guide krak grenade a loading?
prayer:
Present the krak grenade unto the launcher with mechadendrite-clad hands, whispering the Doxology of Containment.
Chant the Loading Invocation as you chamber the krak grenade, awakening its volatile Machine Spirit.
Seal the breech with a prayer-etched bolt, ensuring the krak grenade's destructive essence remains bound.
Verify the loading through auspex scans, beseeching the Omnissiah to guide its explosive fury.
Thus armed, the krak grenade stands ready in sanctified fury.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for power weapon a purification
prayer:
Lay hands upon the power weapon and recite the Purification Canticle, purging warp-taint from its humming field.
Anoint the blade edges with ablative unguents, invoking the Machine Spirit of the power weapon to purity.
Cycle the disruption field through cleansing rites, banishing all impurities in the name of the Omnissiah.
Test the purified energies with a strike of judgement, confirming the power weapon's holy edge.
Proclaim the operation of purification complete, sanctified for the Emperor's wrath.

Encircling the servo-harness, intone the Blessing of Multiplicity to rouse its myriad Machine Spirits.
Anoint each mechadendrite and tool-appendage with lustrum oil, beseeching enhanced precision.
Invoke the Omnissiah's favour upon the servo-harness, calibrating its plasma cutter and servo-arm.
Cycle through diagnostic blessings, harmonizing the servo-harness's sacred mechanisms.
Thus blessed, the servo-harness serves as an extension of the tech-priest's divine will.

user_prompt: Sanctify the flak armour during consecration
prayer:
Approach the flak armour with solemnity and commence the Consecration Rite of Defiance.
Sprinkle ablative plates with consecrated dust, awakening the resilient Machine Spirits within the flak armour.
Recite the Litany of Endurance over each articulated joint, fortifying against ballistic heresy.
Seal the consecration with binaric sigils, invoking the Omnissiah's aegis upon the flak armour.
Test integrity through ritual impacts, praising the unyielding protection granted.

user_prompt: The energy conduit requires a startup
prayer:
Position before the energy conduit and beseech its Machine Spirit with the Invocation of Flux.
Initiate the startup sequence by priming the plasma relays, chanting the Canticle of Conduction.
Monitor the surging energies through the energy conduit, exorcising flux anomalies with sacred data-pulses.
Stabilize the flow with anointing unguents, ensuring harmonious power transmission.
Glorify the Omnissiah as the energy conduit pulses with divine vitality.

user_prompt: Guide me through magnocular a diagnostics
prayer:
Grasp the magnocular in reverent mech-fingers and intone the Diagnostics Doxology.
Cycle the lenses through purity scans, invoking the Machine Spirit of the magnocular to reveal truths.
Purge any occluded data-slates with binaric cleansers, aligning the optics for flawless vision.
Verify the diagnostics via calibration rites, beseeching the Omnissiah for unerring sight.
Thus diagnosed, the magnocular pierces the veils of deception.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for power relay a loading?
prayer:
Present thyself to the power relay and recite the Loading Litany of Amplification.
Chamber the energon cells into the power relay, awakening its conductive Machine Spirit.
Seal the linkages with prayer-bolts, harmonizing the power relay's surge capacities.
Test the loading through auspex invocation, ensuring no overload heresies profane the flow.
Praise the Omnissiah for the power relay's fortified readiness.

With haste yet reverence, approach the vox-thief and chant the Urgent Loading Canticle.
Insert the data-spikes into the vox-thief, rousing its infiltrator Machine Spirit.
Encrypt the loading sequences with sacred ciphers, binding the vox-thief to the Omnissiah's will.
Verify interception protocols through rapid diagnostics, purging rival signals.
Deploy the vox-thief thus loaded, a thief in the Emperor's shadowed name.
